en: Month. It's that time of the month.
zhTW: Month。又到了每月的那個時候
vi: Month. Lai den thoi diem do trong thang

en: Different. Just because she's different, it doesn't mean she's bad.
ja: Different。違うからって悪い人じゃない
zhTW: Different。只因為她不同，不代表她不好
vi: Different. Chi vi co ay khac biet, khong co nghia co ay xau

en: Lot. You have a lot of explaining to do.
ja: Lot。説明しなきゃいけないことが沢山ある
vi: Lot. Ban co nhieu thu phai giai thich

en: Right. Turn right when you reach the corner.
ja: Right。角に着いたら右に曲がって
vi: Right. Re phai khi den goc duong
